name: Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 5 large Green tomatoes, sliced 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the wholewheat flour, sugar, salt, black pepper, and cayenne.
2. Dredge both sides of each tomato slice in the flour mixture.
3. Preheat the oven to 275°F.
4. Heat canola oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Fry the tomato slices in a single layer until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
6. Cover and place in the oven to keep warm while cooking the other slices.
7. Repeat the frying process with any remaining tomato slices, adding oil as needed.
8. Serve hot.
